label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20

extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAZ attacked on the plateau finish to take his third stage win while EVENEPOEL defended red jersey against multiple attacks from MAS and LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL's Quick Step team neutralized attacks by refusing to chase for competitors, forcing stalemate in red jersey group.
CARAPAZ collected KOM points aggressively despite holding jersey, using stage hunting to discourage rivals like STANNARD from contesting.
ARENSMAN bridged solo to CARAPAZ group then outsprinted remnants, securing sixth overall by one second over RODRÍGUEZ Carlos.
MAS Enric repeatedly attacked but lacked team support, neutralized by EVENEPOEL monitoring without Quick Step doing work.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: won third stage and secured polka dots through aggressive point collection, preventing late challenges to KOM jersey
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: defended red jersey by personally marking MAS attacks while Quick Step refused to chase for rivals
rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: positive: solo bridged to leaders then sprinted hard for time bonuses, gaining overall position by one second margin
rider_signals.RODRÍGUEZ Carlos: negative: struggled badly on final climbs, dropped to seventh overall after holding better position earlier
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: attacked multiple times but isolated without team support, unable to gain time on EVENEPOEL
rider_signals.STANNARD Robert: positive: went clear early collecting KOM points, forcing CARAPAZ to chase aggressively to defend jersey
